channel.title: varnish on Drupal WxT
channel.description: Recent content in varnish on Drupal WxT

item.title: Varnish
item.description: Varnish is an open source software-only reverse HTTP caching proxy (often referred to as a Web Accelerator). Varnish is developed on Linux but can be compiled on other UNIX operating systems. It is heavily multi-threaded and is capable of taking advantage of the memory available on 64-bit systems as well as 32-bit systems, and should scale as CPU’s are added. Reputedly, Varnish can respond to hundreds of requests per second.
